config.mcp_server.title: MCP Server
config.mcp_server.allowed_tools_desc: Tools exposed via the MCP endpoint. Leave empty to expose all enabled tools.
config.mcp_server.no_tools_warning: No tools are currently enabled. Enable tools in the Tools section first.
config.mcp_server.auth_warning: Authentication is disabled. Anyone with network access can call your tools.
config.mcp_server.disabled_desc: Enable the toggle to expose AuraGo tools via the Model Context Protocol (MCP) for external agents.
config.mcp_server.info: Exposes AuraGo tools as a remote MCP server using Streamable HTTP transport. External AI agents can discover and call your tools over the network.
config.mcp_server.vscode_bridge_desc: Prepares AuraGo for live debugging from VS Code and similar MCP clients with a safe preset and bridge tools.
config.mcp_server.vscode_bridge_notice: Enables a debugging-focused MCP preset with recommended tools and client setup helpers.
config.mcp_server.vscode_config_desc: Use this snippet to connect an MCP client to the live AuraGo instance.
config.mcp_server.vscode_token_hint: Generate a bearer token before connecting an external MCP client.
config.mcp_server.error_loading_vscode_b: Failed to load VS Code bridge info
config.mcp_server.general_desc: Enable the MCP server and configure basic settings.
config.mcp_server.connection_desc: Endpoint and authentication settings for the MCP server.
